name: Pade approximation recurrence relation
subsection_title: Padé approximations to the exponential function
statement_text:
If l ≥ 1 and m ≥ 2 then
                                  
                        l
 Vlm (z) = 1 −                    z Vl,m−1 (z)
               (l + m)(l + m − 1)
                                     l(m − 1)
                        +                                 z 2 Vl−1,m−2 (z).
                          (l + m)(l + m − 1)2 (l + m − 2)
statement_latex:
\begin{theorem}
If $l \geq 1$ and $m \geq 2$ then
\[
V_{lm}(z) = \left(1 - \frac{l}{(l+m)(l+m-1)}z\right) V_{l,m-1}(z)
+ \frac{l(m-1)}{(l+m)(l+m-1)^2(l+m-2)} z^2 V_{l-1,m-2}(z).
\]
\end{theorem}
